query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `organizations` (
    `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `name` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `settings` JSON NOT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `users` (
    `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `email` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `name` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `role` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'viewer',
    `status` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
    `password_hash` TEXT NULL,
    `google_id` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
    `organization_id` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
    `last_active_at` DATETIME(3) NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    `updated_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    UNIQUE INDEX `users_email_key`(`email`),
    UNIQUE INDEX `users_google_id_key`(`google_id`),
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `invitations` (
    `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `email` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `role` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'interviewer',
    `token` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `invited_by` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `expires_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL,
    `accepted_at` DATETIME(3) NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    UNIQUE INDEX `invitations_token_key`(`token`),
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `activity_logs` (
    `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `user_id` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
    `actor_id` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
    `action` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `details` JSON NOT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `interview_sessions` (
    `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `organization_id` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
    `setup` JSON NOT NULL,
    `status` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'preparing',
    `started_at` DATETIME(3) NULL,
    `ended_at` DATETIME(3) NULL,
    `voice_provider` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'gemini',
    `video_enabled` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
    `audio_data` MEDIUMBLOB NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `transcript_entries` (
    `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `session_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `speaker` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `text` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `timestamp` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL,
    `audio_timestamp` DOUBLE NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `observations` (
    `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `session_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `type` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `dimension` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
    `gate` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
    `description` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `evidence` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `confidence` DOUBLE NOT NULL,
    `timestamp` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `assessor_verdicts` (
    `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `session_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `role` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `recommendation` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `confidence` DOUBLE NOT NULL,
    `narrative` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `dimension_scores` JSON NOT NULL,
    `deep_signal_scores` JSON NULL,
    `psychological_screening` JSON NULL,
    `gate_evaluations` JSON NOT NULL,
    `key_insights` JSON NOT NULL,
    `dissent` TEXT NULL,
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `reports` (
    `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `session_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `candidate_name` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `role_name` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `report_data` JSON NOT NULL,
    `coaching_report` JSON NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `interview_invites` (
    `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `token` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `candidate_name` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `candidate_email` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
    `role_name` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `role_level` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `job_description` TEXT NULL,
    `active_gates` JSON NOT NULL,
    `interview_mode` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
    `status` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
    `session_id` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
    `expires_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    UNIQUE INDEX `interview_invites_token_key`(`token`),
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `calibration_sessions` (
    `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `report_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `title` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `status` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
    `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `calibration_notes` (
    `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `calibration_session_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `user_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `user_name` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `content` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `section_ref` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `report_feedback` (
    `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `report_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `user_id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `overallAccuracy` INTEGER NOT NULL,
    `hire_outcome` VARCHAR(191) NULL,
    `performance_note` TEXT NULL,
    `dimension_feedback` JSON NULL,
    `gate_feedback` JSON NULL,
    `comments` TEXT NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    `updated_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    UNIQUE INDEX `report_feedback_report_id_user_id_key`(`report_id`, `user_id`),
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `system_prompt_versions` (
    `id` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `role` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL,
    `version` INTEGER NOT NULL,
    `prompt` TEXT NOT NULL,
    `is_active` BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
    `performance` JSON NULL,
    `created_at` DATETIME(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    UNIQUE INDEX `system_prompt_versions_role_version_key`(`role`, `version`),
    PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
